category_sources: Official repository README describes XGo as a programming language integrating software engineering, derived from Go, and designed for engineering/STEM/data science.
source_facts.description says XGo is an AI-native programming language.
display_name_sources: Official repository README heading uses The XGo Programming Language.
docs_sources: Official repository Docs link targets doc/docs.md; official README also links tutorial.xgo.dev for tutorials.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already provided; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README describes Go compatibility, compiler/language docs, AI-native positioning, and education/data-science use.
